lab_without_tone: wu hou wen nuan de yang guang wen rou shan yao yu hou xuan lan de cai hong wu cai ban lan yan re de xia ri yi si liang feng lve guo er bian yi dao mei li de feng jing liu lian liu lian
raw_text:
午后温暖的阳光温柔闪耀
雨后绚烂的彩虹五彩斑斓
炎热的夏日一丝凉风掠过耳边
一道美丽的风景 留恋留恋
